statements.__comment: Flag replication jobs that are disabled
statements.query: MATCH (r:ProxmoxReplicationJob {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID}) WHERE r.disable = true SET r.replication_risk = true
statements.name: Mark disabled replication jobs as risk

statements.__comment: Flag replication jobs with no target node configured
statements.query: MATCH (r:ProxmoxReplicationJob {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID}) WHERE NOT EXISTS { MATCH (r)-[:REPLICATES_TO]->() } SET r.target_risk = true
statements.name: Mark replication jobs without target node

statements.__comment: Flag VMs that are not replicated by any job
statements.query: MATCH (v:ProxmoxVM {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID}) WHERE v.template = false AND NOT EXISTS { MATCH (r:ProxmoxReplicationJob {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID})-[:REPLICATES]->(v) } SET v.replication_risk = true
statements.name: Mark VMs without replication coverage

statements.__comment: Flag replication jobs targeting offline nodes
statements.query: MATCH (r:ProxmoxReplicationJob {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID})-[:REPLICATES_TO]->(n:ProxmoxNode {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID}) WHERE n.status <> 'online' SET r.target_risk = true
statements.name: Mark replication jobs with offline target nodes

statements.__comment: Flag replication jobs with very high rate limit (no throttle = potential network impact)
statements.query: MATCH (r:ProxmoxReplicationJob {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID}) WHERE r.rate IS NULL OR r.rate = 0 SET r.network_risk = true
statements.name: Mark replication jobs without rate limiting
